sub_modules.conv3d_stream_index: Combinational converter from flattened stream index to depth, row, and column coordinates.
sub_modules.conv3d_window_valid: Combinational valid-window detector for stride-1 valid-padding 3D convolution.
sub_modules.conv3d_mac: Combinational multiply-accumulate array over the flattened K1 by K2 by K3 convolution window and kernel.
